prompt: Using the provided UI wireframe for a mobile app, generate a photorealistic image of a futuristic control panel for a mech suit, with buttons, sliders, and displays in the same positions as the wireframe elements.
prompt_refined:
Generate a photorealistic image of a futuristic mech suit control panel. Adhere to the layout, relative size, and precise positioning of elements from image 1. Transform the elements as follows:
- The top status bar (time, signal, battery) should be a system status holographic display.
- The 'Address for delivery' and 'Search' input fields should become interactive data screens or command input panels.
- The three circular 'Food category' elements should render as circular glowing buttons or holographic dials.
- The 'Recommended' and 'Popular' rectangular buttons should transform into tactile toggle switches or function selectors.
- The three vertically stacked large rectangular placeholders (with 'X' and wavy text) should become detailed, illuminated information displays showing complex data or schematics.
- The bottom 'Menu' button should be a prominent, illuminated master control button.
Ensure the overall design is sleek, high-tech, and functional, utilizing advanced materials and futuristic interface aesthetics.
objects: Photorealistic futuristic mech suit control panel
Interactive data screen/command input panel (for delivery address)
Interactive data screen/command input panel (for search)
Three circular glowing buttons or holographic dials
Tactile toggle switch or function selector (Recommended)
Tactile toggle switch or function selector (Popular)
Three detailed, illuminated information displays showing complex data or schematics
